title: What on earth is this
wikitext:
[]: What on earth is this!?!             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Jul 06, 2011 6:56 am So yeah, I flicked through Young Ace Issue 5 of 2011 and found this in the center color: Whut?

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Wed Jul 06, 2011 7:01 am Looks like it's Q. We all knew it would come to this. Seriously though, my favorite is the Adam embryo looking like it's a dinner at perhaps a fancy restaurant. And from what I can find so far, looks like this is the work of Tony Takezaki (his name is in big kana above the Evangelion title).

[]: Re: What on earth is this!?!             Quote Post by symbv » Wed Jul 06, 2011 7:07 am InstrumentalityOne wrote: So yeah, I flicked through Young Ace Issue 5 of 2011 and found this in the center color: Whut?

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Jul 06, 2011 7:22 am I nearly busted a gut trying to hold in my laugh. It's morning, and everyone is still sleeping. You're going to need to scan that. I know too many people who would want some of those as avatars.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Wed Jul 06, 2011 8:33 am All that ramen eating makes me think of buying a dozen Cup Noodles, considering it's cold and rainy out here.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Jul 06, 2011 6:17 pm hey, it's something, of course I would prefer a trailer

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jul 07, 2011 1:18 am THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: hey, it's something, of course I would prefer a trailer

[]:             Quote Post by juaxoo » Thu Jul 07, 2011 4:37 am NEON GENESIS EVANGELION: NEW GOURMET EDITION ALL UR FAV CHRACTERS EAT OUT BERSERK YEAH OM NOM NOM NOM WE GOT NOODLES, RAMEN, RICE, ADAM, EVEN PEN-PEN GRILLED AND SERVED HOT! COME GET UR EVA FOOD AND EAT TILL U SHIT ANGELS

[]:             Quote Post by Cross of Iron » Mon Jul 11, 2011 4:44 pm Whut, indeed. That is the funniest thing I have seen in a LONG time!

[]: Re: What on earth is this!?!             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jul 11, 2011 4:46 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: Whut?

[]:             Quote Post by Cross of Iron » Sat Jul 16, 2011 11:07 pm juaxoo wrote: NEON GENESIS EVANGELION: NEW GOURMET EDITION ALL UR FAV CHRACTERS EAT OUT BERSERK YEAH OM NOM NOM NOM WE GOT NOODLES, RAMEN, RICE, ADAM, EVEN PEN-PEN GRILLED AND SERVED HOT! COME GET UR EVA FOOD AND EAT TILL U SHIT ANGELS

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Sep 29, 2011 12:11 pm So umm, I found all the raws for this. It´s only 5 chapters long, started in YA#5-2011, ended in YA#10-2011 and is not exclusively limited to episode previews. The second chapter is about service and involves Pantsuless Maya getting picked up by Kaji, Fuyutsuki beating the crap out of Gendo, Rei banging her face against the floor with a toast in her mouth and Asuka reverse-sexually harrassing Shinji only to argue with Misato while their boobs press on Shinji´s face. Is anyone here interested in typesetting and proofreading? I might pick this up after I finished my first script ever(could take a WHILE) for the 2011 Gunbuster manga adaption(chapter 1) if someone is interested.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Sep 29, 2011 3:22 pm this is just more proof that evangelion can advertises anything. two bucks to anyone that can find something stranger then this.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Sep 29, 2011 3:24 pm that´s no ad, my boy, no ad

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Sep 29, 2011 3:38 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: that´s no ad, my boy, no ad

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Sep 29, 2011 3:40 pm Just a Parody manga

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Thu Sep 29, 2011 9:35 pm I am sure it will go into the next official Eva anthology if it ever gets published. There were a few volumes published in the past, and some of the parody contents there are as outrageously hilarious.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Oct 01, 2011 2:47 pm

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Sun Oct 02, 2011 12:59 am I feel like I want to raid the pantry and get myself a bowl of that hot stuff. Thanks Nav.

[]:             Quote Post by Fleetleader101 » Mon Oct 10, 2011 9:19 pm lol someone should post up the Just Eat is Song with this Magazine as a slide show lol
